title: 6alphasix.jar
description: A mod that adds countless scary entities and dimensions.
body:
![6alphasix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e9d3b716b29021a54466796891cb82f6a8bbcc4.png)

![extra info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/211eaa168c206d07c87a3811354806d21f195563.png)

6alphasix.jar is a horror mod that adds Scary entities, events and dimensions. This mod will slowly corrupt your world. The mod tries to create a unsettling environment. With the old Minecraft fog, old caves, old pre 1.14 look and dimensions. The Feeling of being watched. As if something is watching from the fog. 

6alphasix is a slow burn mod BUT it does start with a few events that only happen once at a certain time. 

The corruption will slowly take over the world. The void entities will take over. This mod can not mess with your pc.

**Things you need to know before playing**
- This mod will grief your builds (don't add it to important worlds)
- This mod will place structures
- This mod can bring you to different dimensions
- This mod can kick you from the game (when killed by certain entities)
- This mod can show custom error popups on the screen
- This mod works fine with biome mods (Not terrain mods)
- Do not play with shaders that change the moon and sun texture
- Do not play on different world types like amplified, large biomes, single biome because the changed terrain generation will make giant caves to bedrock generate
- You need GECKOLIB for this mod
- To use the config you need CONFIGURED

**Content in the mod**
Dimensions:
- Limbo
- Zerovoid
- Flatlands
- Suburbs
- Deltaware
- err.house
- err.level.1
- err.level.2
- err.level.3
- err.level.4
- err.level.5
- Hallways
- Nullscapes
- Nowhere
- Stonelands

**Entities:**
- Anomaly
- Blurred
- Void (Fake Creeper)
- Zero
- Demise
- Disguise
- Fusion
- Dread
- Wrath
- Fate
- Glory
- Dread
- Fury
- Eye
- Fake player
- Fear
- Grace
- I'm Watching
- Infection
- Smiler
- Shade
- Watching.err
- Watching.err.1
- Watching.err.2
- Shooter
- Spheroid
- Wraithwire
- Watching Steve
- Star

**Frequently asked questions**

How do I use the config?
- Use the CONFIGURED mod.

How do I talk to Stellar?
- Use forge version 47.4.10 or use /ask

How do I go to the dimensions?
- Waiting or craft a dimension tp device (you get a paper with the recipe when you boot up the world for the first time).

How do I disable the warning screen?
- Config.
